name: Cursor Studio
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or extend a Cursor Studio macOS menu bar app that plans custom cursor packs from presets, prompt notes, slot lists, hotspot guidance, and exportable briefs. Use when Codex needs to work on a workspace containing `CursorStudioApp`, keep Cursor Studio separate from Folder Studio, regenerate the Xcode project, or validate the `CursorStudio` scheme and tests.
short_description: Preset-driven cursor pack workflows for macOS
audience: Mac users designing repeatable cursor-pack briefs and role lists
Builders shipping compact menu-bar utilities with deterministic export flows
Teams keeping cursor-pack planning separate from Finder folder icon work
detail_lines: Keeps preset, accent palette, cursor-role scope, exact slot selection, hotspot notes, and export target visible in a compact menu-bar workflow.
Produces deterministic markdown or JSON briefs for cursor-pack work instead of pretending to generate live cursor artwork when no generator is wired in.
Uses explicit local workspace inputs and does not require hidden network calls, account tokens, or broad filesystem persistence.
